replies.msg:
今年考既話 我比少少考試技巧既建議
你講得啱 作文最緊要有framework
背文冇必要，冇乜文可以咁萬金油乜野topic都應用到
佢可以睇大量5**作文既examples, 然後從中歸納，整個啱自己用既framework

我自己應考既framework:
1. Intro paragraph:
比全文一個方向
Give a strong first impression (各種入題法)
no grammatical mistakes
做到呢三樣野，已經係5**作文既intro

2. first content paragraph
Topic sentence (清晰簡潔交代呢段既重點，唔好比example)
elaboration 1
example
elaboration 2
example
short conclusion

elaboration 1&2講緊既係用兩種唔同方法去elab. elaboration methods 包括引用論証、對比論証、比喻論証、歸納論証等等，然後比example. 練下點樣用多角點論証，每個elaboration 都做到咁既話，content分一定滿7分

3. second & third content paragraph
Connective (Moreover,/What's more,/Despite...,)
然後同first content paragraph flow 一樣

4. 收尾段
學識用個靚既意象，帶出美好既祈願之類
no grammatical mistakes

以上係最經典三個point既議論文寫法。根據題目要求要再自己加插transitional paragraph或者駁論段。
^^that's how you make a piece of 5** writing.

Integrated skills 方面
唔係考英文，係考組織唔同既information既能力
搞得掂writing 既話，integrated 唯一難既係要睇得快同寫得快，integrated卷入面寫果幾篇文基本上唔洗自己諗寫作框架
5**既integrated，content方面完全唔需要自己既input, 喺哂data file 同listening material 入面。唔好自己freestyle
然後多操練

replies.msg:
中一聽唔明，下學期開始努力學英文
自己evaluate自己既話，我覺得中五上學期英文各方面實力已經有5**水平，中五至中六既時間用哂黎study past papers, 研究考試技巧，實力方面冇進步過
progress 方面，the closer to the mountain top the harder it gets. 我會覺得由U (中一) 去到 lv5 只用左兩年 (中三)，而由5去到5**都係兩年(中五)

為左學英文乜都做過，當下定決心之後，睇學校訂既scmp、自己買英文書睇、study grammar book、背生字
呢d野係好事，我會形容係學院式學習方法(academic learning)
如果你有毅力捱到一段時間既話，會打下好好既基礎。但太消磨興趣。

學左一排，有番咁上下水平之後我已經懶得理生字grammar，轉用浸淫式學習(Total immersive learning)
屋企窮從來冇去過外國，但冇條件就自己創造條件
將生活中既一切轉做英文
手機language, 學校搵friend一齊講英文、同邪教摩門brothers&sisters傾計但唔番教會、聽歌、睇戲、睇美劇、睇youtube、番學撘車之類既碎片化時間就聽podcast或者入定既英文mp3
但immersive learning要慎用。最緊要係一定要完全浸淫，唔同求求其其睇戲鳩下笑下就算，容易流於娛樂而非學習
我睇英文videos會刻意每句都pause, 然後模仿佢地講野，扮埋accent，聽到有意思既句子就抄底，久而久之就可以speak like a native

簡單summarise 既話，八成immersive，兩成academic，呢個balance唔一定啱你，摸索下自己既mix

以上講既只係如何培養英文實力，如果你既目標係5**既話，要學埋考試技巧

I would say people with lvl 5 English should have a reasonable good command of the language and decent exam skills. If you can communicate with English speakers fluently, have a good variety of vocabulary, and practice dse papers regularly, I'd say you should have no problem scoring a 5.

But why stop there? Let's shoot for the stars man! Hustle in both academic and immersive learning methods, design a training program for yourself, drill on those past papers like a motherfucker and study what markers are thinking by looking at the marking schemes. replies.msg:
1. 你有兩個問題
第一的確唔夠immersive. 可以好似我咁跟住一句一句講
immersive係將自己深度浸淫喺個語境入面，grammar, sentence structure, style, accent，所有野都學到，不限口音
第二，睇你writing 同speaking差應該係你缺乏表達能力
practice speaking and writing a lot, and focus on achieving 3 goals:
a. express your idea in a clear manner
b. being able to speak on a topic continuously, non stop, for at least 30 minutes
c. get a lot of expressive vocabulary like adjectives. it will do you wonders

2. 組織結構係講緊你成篇文既框架佈局，例如寫一個proposal你會用分別用幾多篇幅交代背境、敍述問題成因、提出方案等等。而你講既句子結構同vocab唔係篇文既organization 問題而係language

3. 好問題
背生字我會叫我既學生一日三個，不能多不能少
但呢三個每個都要係有用，要令佢變成你既active vocabulary, 融入左喺你既語言既一部份，好自然可以用番出黎，而唔係好似大陸仔咁背字典學幾千個passive vocabulary被考試時明白意思但冇辦法主動使用
具體方法係今晚揀三個字，先查字典了解佢既定義，再直接google呢個字，會搵到一大堆text入面包含呢個字，你就會知道how people use this word in real life
And in the next day when you go about your day, try to actively use these 3 words in your speaking, thinking and writing as much as possible. This way your brain will make a lot of connections between these words and your daily life. And they will become your own words.

Hope you find these useful

麻到你唔好意思

1. 你有兩個問題
第一的確唔夠immersive. 可以好似我咁跟住一句一句講
immersive係將自己深度浸淫喺個語境入面，grammar, sentence structure, style, accent，所有野都學到，不限口音
第二，睇你writing 同speaking差應該係你缺乏表達能力
practice speaking and writing a lot, and focus on achieving 3 goals:
a. express your idea in a clear manner
b. being able to speak on a topic continuously, non stop, for at least 30 minutes
c. get a lot of expressive vocabulary like adjectives. it will do you wonders

2. 組織結構係講緊你成篇文既框架佈局，例如寫一個proposal你會用分別用幾多篇幅交代背境、敍述問題成因、提出方案等等。而你講既句子結構同vocab唔係篇文既organization 問題而係language

3. 好問題
背生字我會叫我既學生一日三個，不能多不能少
但呢三個每個都要係有用，要令佢變成你既active vocabulary, 融入左喺你既語言既一部份，好自然可以用番出黎，而唔係好似大陸仔咁背字典學幾千個passive vocabulary被考試時明白意思但冇辦法主動使用
具體方法係今晚揀三個字，先查字典了解佢既定義，再直接google呢個字，會搵到一大堆text入面包含呢個字，你就會知道how people use this word in real life
And in the next day when you go about your day, try to actively use these 3 words in your speaking, thinking and writing as much as possible. This way your brain will make a lot of connections between these words and your daily life. And they will become your own words.

Hope you find these useful

progress 方面，the closer to the mountain top the harder it gets. 我會覺得由U (中一) 去到 lv5 只用左兩年 (中三)，而由5去到5**都係兩年(中五)

為左學英文乜都做過，當下定決心之後，睇學校訂既scmp、自己買英文書睇、study grammar book、背生字
呢d野係好事，我會形容係學院式學習方法(academic learning)
如果你有毅力捱到一段時間既話，會打下好好既基礎。但太消磨興趣。

學左一排，有番咁上下水平之後我已經懶得理生字grammar，轉用浸淫式學習(Total immersive learning)
屋企窮從來冇去過外國，但冇條件就自己創造條件
將生活中既一切轉做英文
手機language, 學校搵friend一齊講英文、同邪教摩門brothers&sisters傾計但唔番教會、聽歌、睇戲、睇美劇、睇youtube、番學撘車之類既碎片化時間就聽podcast或者入定既英文mp3
但immersive learning要慎用。最緊要係一定要完全浸淫，唔同求求其其睇戲鳩下笑下就算，容易流於娛樂而非學習
我睇英文videos會刻意每句都pause, 然後模仿佢地講野，扮埋accent，聽到有意思既句子就抄底，久而久之就可以speak like a native

簡單summarise 既話，八成immersive，兩成academic，呢個balance唔一定啱你，摸索下自己既mix

以上講既只係如何培養英文實力，如果你既目標係5**既話，要學埋考試技巧

我有啲問題想請教下架

1.上面嘅情況唔知係咪因為我learning唔夠immersive呢
我平日睇嘅youtube美劇全部都係英文
之前返parttime bar都返咗一間多數外國人去嘅bar (而家無做)
但就無好似你咁逐句pause跟佢講
可能因為咁淪為娛樂而非學習
我而家pronunciation同accent應該同外國人差唔多
不過句子同演講組織就完全跟唔上
我係咪都應該好似你咁一句pause一次跟佢講
定係呢個陣係練口音?

2.同埋writing嘅組織又應該如何改善
係咪應該學多啲唔同嘅句子結構同vocab?

3.另外我想問埋如果背vocab應該點背會好啲?
我係有一本notebook寫底我見到唔識嘅生字嘅
咁我係咪應該繼續寫我唔識嘅生字
同時每日背返我之前寫嘅生字?
同埋你會唔會背埋個part of speech
同埋試一次作句會用到呢個詞嘅句子?
我驚就咁背未必作文會醒起隻字
而且之前背過嘅字洗唔洗連埋今日嗰啲一齊背
因為3隻字好似好快就背好
我驚個印象唔深

我上面想問嘅都唔係考試上嘅進步
我係想喺職場上或者大學上嘅assignment presentation可以有進步
打咗咁多野添
感謝你呀
麻到你唔好意思

1. 你有兩個問題
第一的確唔夠immersive. 可以好似我咁跟住一句一句講
immersive係將自己深度浸淫喺個語境入面，grammar, sentence structure, style, accent，所有野都學到，不限口音
第二，睇你writing 同speaking差應該係你缺乏表達能力
practice speaking and writing a lot, and focus on achieving 3 goals:
a. express your idea in a clear manner
b. being able to speak on a topic continuously, non stop, for at least 30 minutes
c. get a lot of expressive vocabulary like adjectives. it will do you wonders

2. 組織結構係講緊你成篇文既框架佈局，例如寫一個proposal你會用分別用幾多篇幅交代背境、敍述問題成因、提出方案等等。而你講既句子結構同vocab唔係篇文既organization 問題而係language

3. 好問題
背生字我會叫我既學生一日三個，不能多不能少
但呢三個每個都要係有用，要令佢變成你既active vocabulary, 融入左喺你既語言既一部份，好自然可以用番出黎，而唔係好似大陸仔咁背字典學幾千個passive vocabulary被考試時明白意思但冇辦法主動使用
具體方法係今晚揀三個字，先查字典了解佢既定義，再直接google呢個字，會搵到一大堆text入面包含呢個字，你就會知道how people use this word in real life
And in the next day when you go about your day, try to actively use these 3 words in your speaking, thinking and writing as much as possible. This way your brain will make a lot of connections between these words and your daily life. And they will become your own words.

Hope you find these useful

replies.msg:
Yo my bro I'm doing great. Let's address your issues one by one.

1. TOEFL or Ielts
I have never taken a TOEFL test. So I can't tell you the differences between that and Ielts. But from what I know about Ielts, it is an international test. YOU DO NOT NEED to style your English british to get good scores. As for which test to take, it will be your chores to find out which one suits more to your specific purposes.

2. Speaking & social anxiety
You wanna speak like a native white dude? Great goal! More power to you my man. You seem to have good exposure by a long time of English immersion. But from what you wrote, I can see that your grammar is a big issue. Grammar is extremely important. Fuck everyone who says otherwise. What I would advice you to do will be different from what I advice others. What you need is not immersion but academic learning. Get a good grammar book, and invest a considerable amount of time (at least 6 months) to just drill that shit. Build up a strong and systematic foundation in English (you especially need that since you quit school at a young age) and go on from there.
On the other hand, social anxiety is a real issue man. Quit being a nerd, open up yourself to the real world and become a real alpha dude. I'm not a psychologist but I have been there. It's not a good life to live being a loser.

Best wishes to you. Hope you find my advice useful.

盲操paper可以令你掌握到考試模式，我唔會話完全冇用

1. I got a problem of using vocabularies incorrectly, and sometimes I am embarrassed with it. I think I misunderstood those words when I learnt them. How can I improve or consolidate the usage of vocabularies?

replies.msg:
1. May I refer you to #142 about how to learn "active vocabulary"
Don't be embarrassed. There's no shame in being bad at something, it's only shameful when you give up.

2. Immerse, my friend. Learning phonetics can definitely help. But you have to be able to withstand the boredom and hard work. I have learnt phonetics myself and I'd say it worths the pain. But if you can't stick to it, it's fine to just follow a particular youtuber with your preferred accent and imitate. Do it long enough and you will find it very helpful.
For specific business communication purposes, you will need to do some specific work on that too. There are plenty of resources on business English. Just google it or get a good book as your guide.

You're welcome.

You wrote:

"Also I would suggest you to drop your shyness."

呢句同好多香港人一樣, 你用咗中文去譯, " 我提議你去乜乜乜, 但 form 2 已經教嘅 gerund/to-infinitive, suggest 後面係用 gerund.

應該寫成:

"Also I would suggest dropping your shyness."

OR

"Also I would suggest that you drop your shyness."

記住係 form 2 程度.

仲有你寫:

"learn a lot of vocabulary"

又係港式英文, 以為 vocabulary 解生字, 實際係解詞彙, 可以指一個人所識嘅所有字, 所以一個人得一個 vocabulary, 除非再細分為 medical vocabulary/French vocabulary 等等, 所以想講學多 d 生字, 只可以講 get a larger vocabulary/expand your vocabulary/learn more words, 唔可以講 learn a lot of vocabulary.

仲有其他 mistake, 以上只係其二, 仲要係低 level 嘅 grammar, 一個英文好少少嘅 F3 學生已經唔會錯, 你亦絕對唔係打錯, 而係唔識, 仲有, 你以為用多幾句鬼佬罐頭句子/phrase 就會令你 d 英文唔港式? 你覺得無人會睇得出你係夾硬砌出嚟扮鬼佬但又生硬到極?
